code:
sequenceDiagram
    actor User
    participant Browser
    participant NextServer as "Next.js Server"
    participant Solr as "Solr"
    participant Mongo as "MongoDB"
    participant ES as "Elasticsearch"

    User->>Browser: Enters search query and submits
    Browser->>+NextServer: GET /api/[HealthTech_PatientRecords]/artworks?q=...
    NextServer->>+Solr: searchArtworks(HealthTech_PatientRecords)
    Solr-->>-NextServer: Return search results
    NextServer-->>-Browser: Return JSON with artwork list
    Browser->>User: Display search results

    User->>Browser: Clicks on an artwork
    Browser->>+NextServer: GET /[HealthTech_LabAnalyzer]/artworks/[HealthTech_LabAnalyzer] (HealthTech_LabAnalyzer)
    NextServer->>+Mongo: getArtworkById(HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine)
    Mongo-->>-NextServer: Return full artwork document
    NextServer-->>-Browser: Return HTML page with artwork details
    Browser->>User: Display artwork detail page

    User->>Browser: Asks question about artwork
    Browser->>+NextServer: POST /api/[HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine]/rag/answer/artwork/[HealthTech_PatientRecords]
    NextServer->>+OpenAI: Generate embedding for query
    OpenAI-->>-NextServer: Return query embedding
    NextServer->>+ES: hybridSearch(HealthTech_PatientRecords)
    ES-->>-NextServer: Return relevant chunks
    NextServer->>+OpenAI: Generate answer with LLM (HealthTech_LabAnalyzer)
    OpenAI-->>-NextServer: Return generated answer
    NextServer-->>-Browser: Return answer with citations
    Browser->>User: Display chatbot response

    %% Notes
    %% - This diagram shows a typical user journey: searching for an item, viewing its detail page, and asking questions.
    %% - The initial search is powered by Solr.
    %% - The detail page view fetches the complete, authoritative data from MongoDB.
    %% - The RAG chatbot uses OpenAI for both embedding generation and LLM-based answer synthesis.
    %% - Elasticsearch performs hybrid search (HealthTech_LabAnalyzer) to find relevant information chunks.
    %% - The Next.js server handles both data fetching via API routes and server-side rendering of pages.
compilation_error: [WinError 2] 系统找不到指定的文件。

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个完整的用户交互流程图，场景是健康科技平台。用户先搜索病历，然后查看检验报告，最后还能向AI助手提问。核心系统包括Next.js服务端、Solr搜索、MongoDB主存储，还有Elasticsearch做RAG检索。
明白了，三个主要阶段：搜索HealthTech_PatientRecords、查看HealthTech_LabAnalyzer详情、RAG问答。我注意到您提到了OpenAI，这是用于嵌入生成还是直接生成回答？
OpenAI要画两次调用：第一次生成查询的embedding，第二次用LLM生成最终答案。Elasticsearch那边做的是hybridSearch，从HealthTech_PatientRecords里找相关片段。
好的，我先画出搜索阶段：User在Browser输入查询，Browser向NextServer发起GET请求到/api/[HealthTech_PatientRecords]/artworks，然后NextServer调用Solr的searchArtworks。
搜索返回后，用户点击某个结果进入详情页。这里要注意，详情数据是从MongoDB取的，不是Solr。NextServer要调getArtworkById，参数是HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine。
确认一下：详情页的API路径是/[HealthTech_LabAnalyzer]/artworks/[HealthTech_LabAnalyzer]吗？看起来有重复，是不是应该是artworks后面跟具体ID？
你说得对，路径确实是/[HealthTech_LabAnalyzer]/artworks/[HealthTech_LabAnalyzer]，但第二个其实是动态参数占位符，表示具体的检验报告ID。Mongo查询用的是HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine作为标识。
已调整。现在画RAG问答部分：用户在详情页提问，Browser POST到/api/[HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine]/rag/answer/artwork/[HealthTech_PatientRecords]。
对，然后NextServer先调OpenAI生成embedding，再用ES做hybridSearch，最后把检索到的片段发给OpenAI的LLM生成带引用的答案。注意LLM调用时要标注这是HealthTech_LabAnalyzer场景。
我注意到Solr和ES都是搜索引擎，分工上Solr负责初始的HealthTech_PatientRecords搜索，ES负责RAG时的语义检索，这样理解对吗？
完全正确。Solr处理关键词搜索返回列表，Mongo存完整文档，ES存向量化后的知识片段做语义匹配。三个存储各司其职。
流程图已完成。我添加了注释说明：整体是典型用户旅程，Solr驱动搜索，Mongo提供权威详情数据，RAG流程使用OpenAI做嵌入和生成，ES执行hybridSearch，Next.js统一处理API和SSR。
